name: Chicken Chalupa (Sha-loop'-a)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the soup, milk, sour cream, and chilies in a bowl.
2. Grease a 6-inch deep by 9-inch round casserole dish.
3. Tear at least four tortillas into large pieces and use them to cover the bottom of the casserole dish.
4. Put 1/3 of the chicken on top of the tortillas.
5. Pour 1/3 of the soup mixture over the chicken, then cover with a layer of grated cheese.
6. Repeat steps 4 and 5 with tortillas, chicken, soup mixture, and cheese, twice (if your dish isn't deep enough, only make two layers).
7. Bake in a 325 degree oven for 45 minutes, uncovered. The cheese should be melted, and the tortillas well-cooked.
8. For spicier palates, more green chilies may be added.
